text: I just want someone to hold me, let me fall apart in their arms, cry on their lap, and hear them say that everything will be okay.
I like being alone, but I don’t like being alone with my thoughts — they always end up consuming me.
If you feel the urge to return where you left your ghosts behind, don’t. You left for a reason.
It hurts when the only one who sees your silent screams is the same one who broke you.
I don’t smile or get hopeful anymore. Those emotions always end up hurting the most.
